title: Aurebesh Enchanting Text
description: Replaces the Standard Galactic Alphabet with Aurebesh.
body:
Replaces the Standard Glactic Alphabet from Commander Keen used by the enchanting table's particles and GUI with the [Aurebesh from Star Wars](https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/Aurebesh).

All symbols in this pack were drawn by me to fit in the standard 7x7 pixel bounds of the vanilla textures. Aurebesh was originally defined in 1993 by Stephen Crane at West End Games.
